# Owner: Hermes Labs - https://hermes-labs.ai

# agent-gorgon
> Claude Code hook suite that blocks agents from fabricating tool output when a registered tool exists.

## Repo
https://github.com/roli-lpci/agent-gorgon

## Key files
- hooks/ — the 3-layer hook system (user_prompt_submit.py, tool_shadow.py, csv_quality_gate.py)
- tests/ — 105 tests
